/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/compiz/src=/usr/src/debug/compiz -flto=auto -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/commands.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcommands.so -o libcommands.so CMakeFiles/commands.dir/src/commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commands.dir/__/__/generated/commands_options.cpp.o   -L/usr/lib/compiz  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::: -lXdamage -lXcomposite -lXcursor -lX11-xcb -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXi -lXext -lXfixes -lX11 -lxcb -lSM -lICE -lxslt -lxml2 -lgio-2.0 -lglibmm-2.4 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lstartup-notification-1 ../../src/libcompiz_core.so.0.9.14.2
